Hi, I'm Juvy!

Your trusted CPA, bookkeeper & tax preparer

A proactive and detail-oriented CPA with 11+ years of combined experience in accounting and auditing, including internal audit, compliance, and financial reporting, plus hands-on training in modern bookkeeping platforms. I specialize in maintaining accurate financial records, reconciling accounts, and supporting tax preparation and payroll processes, helping businesses gain clarity and confidence in their finances.

11+ Years Experience · CPA Certified · QuickBooks / Xero / Gusto Trained

How I Work With Clients

A clear yet flexible process designed to keep your books accurate and your business growing.

1

Discovery Call

We start with a free consultation to learn about your business, your goals, and your bookkeeping needs.

2

Set Up & Organize

I get your books organized, clean up any past issues, and set up efficient systems for smooth operations.

3

Manage & Maintain

Each month, I handle your bookkeeping — reconciling accounts, tracking expenses, and keeping records current.

4

Review & Grow

We review clear, easy-to-understand reports so you always know where your business stands.

Bring clarity to your finances with Juvy today!

Your journey to organized finances starts now.
